description:
Add a role visibility card to the Settings page showing what roles/permissions the current user has.

## Requirements

### File: `src/app/settings/page.tsx`

Add a new card/section below the profile section:

**"Your Roles" Card:**
- Fetches the current user's roles (from user_roles table, same as user-context.tsx does)
- Renders each role as a badge with its configured color from ROLE_CONFIG in `src/lib/permissions.ts`
- Below each badge: short description of what the role can access (from ROLE_CONFIG.description)
- If no roles assigned: "No roles assigned — contact an administrator to get access rights"
- Loading state while fetching
- The user cannot add/remove roles here (that's the Admin page) — this is read-only

### Tests
- Roles render as colored badges
- Description text matches ROLE_CONFIG
- "No roles" state renders correctly
- Loading state shows skeleton

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
